---
title: "Personnel"
---

```{=html}
<style>
.person-card img{
  object-fit:cover;
  display:block;
  border-radius:12px;
}

.Alumni-nav{
    display:block;
    width:150px;
    margin:40px auto;
    padding:12px 24px;
    text-align:center;
    background:#2ca25f;
    color:white;
    text-decoration:none;
    border-radius:999px;
    transition:.2s;
}

.Alumni-nav:hover{
    background:#238b45;
    transform:translateY(-2px);
}
.person-card img{
    object-fit:cover;
    display:block;
    border-radius:12px;
}



</style>
```

## Principal Investigator

:::: person-card
<img src="images/people/pi.jpg" class="profile"/>

<div>

### Dr. Cheng Jack Song

Professor

Research interests

-   Kidney organoids
-   Kidney disease
-   Genomics

</div>
::::

## Staff

:::: person-card
<img src="images/Trang.png" width="100"/>

<div>

### Trang

Lab Manager

Responsible for laboratory management, colony, and daily operations.

</div>
::::

:::: person-card
<img src="images/people/alex.jpg" class="profile"/>

<div>

### Alex <a href="mailto:aig@uab.edu"><i class="bi bi-envelope-fill"></i></a> <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/yourname" target="_blank"><i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i></a> <a href="https://github.com/yourname" target="_blank"><i class="bi bi-github"></i></a>



Research Technician

Research interests

-   Single-cell RNA-seq
-   Single-cell ATAC-seq
-   Computational biology

</div>
::::

## Students

:::: person-card
<img src="images/people/person2.jpg" class="profile"/>

<div>

### A

Ph.D. Student

Research interests

-   Disease mechanisms

</div>
::::

<a class="Alumni-nav" href="alumni.html"> View Alumni </a>
